The '''''Discord''''' was a [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] in service to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] during the reign of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. It was under the [[Commanding officer/Legends|command]] of [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Fessix]], who maintained a close relationship with [[SoroSuub Corporation/Legends|SoroSuub Corporation's]] [[Varada sector/Legends|Varada sector]] holdings [[Top OpEx|top operating executive]] [[Tyanna Tymb]] and regularly received information from her regarding her New Republic customers.<ref name="Polyhedron" />

==Behind the scenes==
The ''Discord'' was introduced in "[[Adversaries: Characters for the Star Wars: New Republic Campaign]]," a [[roleplaying game]] source article authored by [[Bill Slavicsek]] for use with [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'' and published in the [[Polyhedron 97|ninety-seventh issue]] of the ''[[Polyhedron]]'' magazine in [[July]] [[1994]]. Since that article was released outside of the [[Lucas Licensing]] process,<ref name="Polyhedron" /> it was considered non-[[canon]]ical with respect to the [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]] continuity.<ref name="UnlicensedStatus">{{UnlicensedStatus}}</ref>
